description_for_human: Market intelligence for AI agents. Find competitors, market gaps, and get BUILD/PIVOT/AVOID verdicts for $5.
description_for_model: CentralWize provides competitive analysis and market gap identification for AI product ideas. Send a product description and get back competitors with funding data, workflow-level market gaps, and a strategic verdict. Backed by 11,000+ AI tools mapped to 54,000+ workflow mappings across 54 industries. Use this when an agent needs to validate a product idea, find competitors, or identify underserved markets.
